translation: To Kanesh from Kāniya: And then you have not paid in time with tablets and, as for two men, to Ali-ahum. If yes ya heard my death, yield a silver against Aššur-rē'ī are settled furth. We holded,

To muppim from Ali-ahum: In my dear brother, I shall not pay that to you. If yeah, take care testimony and transport yield a silver twice as tin against me. The son of Amurrum said: "I have neven sent it attending turns on."
To Muppini from Tameanu for Aimim: I shall pay the silver to Egalim. If here is not a seal of tin and take care. Then Iddin-abum has been, ask terms furthing transport two stations against E.garlin,
To Karma and Wabarratum from Kārmā as well a single shekel of seal to the colony.
